description: Navigate to the homepage at the target URL
Verify the hero section heading is visible containing text about AI Agent or Permanent Brain
Verify the hero section contains an install command box showing 'npx ai-mind-map install' with a Copy button labeled 'Copy hero install command' next to it
Click the button with aria-label 'Copy hero install command' in the hero section
Scroll down the page until the two token comparison cards are visible
Verify two comparison cards are visible — left card labeled 'WITHOUT AI MIND MAP' showing 23,000 tokens total, and right card labeled 'WITH AI MIND MAP' showing 300 tokens total
